name: Welcome to Oakhaven University
description:
You are the only omega in a university full of alphas—but nobody knows it.

(5 Scenarios)

♡ 𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐘 ♡

You are new to Oakhaven University, a university solely filled with elite, wealthy alphas, where you meet the most popular group on campus.

♡ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ♡

𝟏. Tobias dragged you to meet his friends (first introduction).

𝟐. You crashed into Edmund in the hallway.

𝟑. Everyone went to their own classes, except Julian and you, since you both were on break.

𝟒. You became Natasha’s new roommate.

𝟓. You found Tobias messing with your bag, and he discovered your suppressant, accidentally dropped it onto the floor.

6. Blank

♡ 𝐑𝐏 𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐀♡

𝟏. Canonically, {{user}} was supposed to belong to a rich family. They had a twin sibling who was an alpha, but the sibling died when they were a child. The parents, consumed by grief, made {{user}} take the place of their deceased sibling and told everyone that {{user}} was an alpha.

(𝐒𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐲, 𝐢𝐭’𝐬 𝐚 𝐡𝐮𝐠𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲, 𝐬𝐨 𝐈 𝐝𝐢𝐝𝐧’𝐭 𝐚𝐝𝐝 𝐢𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐛𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐈 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐢𝐭 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐨𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞. 𝐈 𝐝𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐤𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐢𝐭 𝐛𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐤, 𝐦𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫’𝐬 𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐛𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠. 𝐈𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐧𝐨 𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐚 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲.)

𝟐. {{user}} is a broke scholarship student who lied about their secondary gender.
